## Describe the Bug
A clear description of what went wrong.

## Content Type
What content type were you creating? (blog post, email, social post, etc.)

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Activated the skill with `...`
2. Asked Claude to `...`
3. The output was `...`

## Expected Behavior
What you expected the skill to produce.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Skill Version
Which commit or version of the skill are you using?

## Additional Context
Paste any relevant output or screenshots.
